name: American Chow Mein
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook macaroni as per package directions. Drain and set aside.
2. In a large skillet, brown the ground beef and drain off any grease.
3. Add the can of tomatoes and chop finely.
4. Add the diced onion and oregano, salt, and pepper to taste.
5. Cook together for a few minutes on low heat.
6. Add the macaroni to the mixture and blend together.
7. Serve as a great recipe when a crowd comes by to visit. Ground beef can be cooked and frozen in zip-lock bags, with all air expressed from the bag, to keep well.
